{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Abyssal Palace tower
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An [[Abyssal Palace tower]] is a squat brown cylinder of packed dirt and stone ringed with [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] earned twenty points for clearing out an [[Abyssal Palace tower]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
